message:
feat(render): Add CountingWriter for output bytes tracking (bd-3aqs)

Implements byte counting infrastructure for verifying O(changes) output:
- CountingWriter<W>: Wraps any Write, tracks bytes written
- PresentStats: Captures bytes, cells, runs, duration
- Budget constants: BYTES_PER_CELL_MAX, SYNC_OVERHEAD, etc.
- StatsCollector: Helper for timing present() operations
- 21 tests covering all functionality

Also closes bd-cyww (DegradationLevel) and bd-389n (FrameBudgetConfig)
which were already implemented in bd-1iqn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
